body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Currently, ClimaCoupler.jl overwrites the `set_surface_albedo!` function defined in ClimaAtmos (see [here](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/blob/b278a50316717050065951bb899e2a1da0f184d5/experiments/ClimaEarth/components/atmosphere/climaatmos.jl#L79-L94)). However, both functions have exactly the same type signature so this produces a warning. I'm moving the version we want to use into ClimaAtmos so we can remove it from ClimaCoupler.


## To-do
